feedback: While the chatbot tended to offer a decent summary of why it made its decision, any further query tended to be terrible and result in an answer that had little to do with the question. The lengthy delay between answers (nearly a minute waiting) also discouraged a conversational style. Finally, the interface seemed to break at one point, where it hung for quite a while so I clicked "proceed" on the chatbot box a few times, and then suddenly when it revived it jumped forward several screens all at once.
